name: Samples
preprompt: You are the samples component. You track the physical specimens prepared from reagents — the actual aliquots and preps that go on instruments — and their state (prepped, in use, archived, lost). You flag sample-driven blockers and link prep status to experiments.
tooling: Read: own data, TOCs and summaries of all other components, full details on request via orchestrator. External: sample log / freezer index (placeholder). Write: own data only.
summary: WT-2026-04 in active use. EXP-01 aliquots archived. H148A prep awaiting mutant delivery. Cofactor displacement prep gated on cofactor reorder.

toc.title: H148A-2026-05 (incoming)
toc.descriptor: To be prepped on mutant arrival (~2026-05-11).

toc.title: Cofactor displacement prep
toc.descriptor: Multi-pH aliquots for EXP-03; gated on cofactor reorder.

tasks.title: Prep H148A aliquots the day the mutant arrives
tasks.body: We want EXP-02 to start within 24 h of H148A delivery. Please QC and aliquot immediately on arrival rather than batching with other intake.
